channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: South Africa selected as Berlinale European Film Market’s 2027 Country in Focus during Cannes Festival
item.description: South Africa has officially been selected as the “Country in Focus” for the 2027 Berlinale European Film Market (EFM), a major international platform linked to the Berlin International Film Festival. ...

item.title: Whole-body vibration training: benefits and scientific evidence on fat loss and muscle strength
item.description: This article examines the growing popularity of whole-body vibration training, a fitness method that involves standing on a vibrating platform for short sessions, typically around 15 minutes several t...

item.title: Ogie Alcasid clarifies Regine Velasquez has no retirement plans yet
item.description: Ogie Alcasid has addressed and clarified recent speculation about the possible retirement of Regine Velasquez, popularly known as Asia’s Songbird and one of the most iconic voices in Original Pilipino...

item.title: Prof. Faith Ken-Aminikpo Delivers Insightful Lecture on Theatre Arts in Education at UNIPORT
item.description: Prof. Faith Ken-Aminikpo, the first female Professor of Theatre Arts in Education from the University of Port Harcourt (UNIPORT) and Rivers State, delivered the institution’s 211th inaugural lecture t...

item.title: Reports of gunfire outside the White House prompt security response
item.description: On Saturday, May 23, 2026, multiple journalists reported hearing what sounded like gunshots outside the White House in Washington, D.C. According to ABC senior White House correspondent Selina Wang, s...

item.title: IAEA Chief Warns UN Security Council of Severe Risks Following Drone Strike Near UAE Nuclear Plant
item.description: International Atomic Energy Agency (IAEA) Director General Rafael Mariano Grossi addressed the United Nations Security Council following a drone strike incident near the Barakah Nuclear Power Plant in...

item.title: SolarSquare negotiates $55–60M Series C led by B Capital and Lightspeed amid India rooftop solar growth
item.description: SolarSquare, a Mumbai-based rooftop solar startup founded in 2015, is in advanced discussions to raise a new Series C funding round led by B Capital and Lightspeed Venture Partners. The round is expec...

item.title: Sydney gang figure Lorenzo Lamalu shot dead in Vietnam as police monitor possible retaliation
item.description: Sydney underworld figure Lorenzo Lamalu, 24, was shot dead at a restaurant in Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam, in what authorities believe was a targeted attack linked to organised crime tensions. CCTV foot...

item.title: Trump signals near-finalised US–Iran peace deal with plan to reopen Strait of Hormuz
item.description: US President Donald Trump has claimed that a peace agreement between the United States and Iran is “largely negotiated”, with final details still to be settled among the parties involved. In a social ...

item.title: UK court sentences man to life imprisonment for killing Kenyan caregiver in Birmingham
item.description: A court in the United Kingdom has sentenced a 46-year-old British man, David Walsh, to life imprisonment after he was found guilty of killing Kenyan caregiver Irene Wanjiru Mbungua in Birmingham in Ju...

item.title: FIFA approves Iran training camp relocation from USA to Mexico due to visa issues
item.description: FIFA has approved Iran’s request to move its 2026 World Cup training base from Tucson, Arizona in the United States to Tijuana in Mexico, following difficulties linked to obtaining visas for entry int...

item.title: Suspect in Pelican Narrows homicide arrested after police search
item.description: A man from Saskatchewan who was wanted in connection with a homicide in Pelican Narrows has been arrested, according to the provided report. Police had been searching for the suspect following the kil...

item.title: Water rationing affects Westville Theatre Club performances amid eThekwini Southern Aqueduct works
item.description: The Westville Theatre Club in eThekwini has been significantly affected by ongoing water rationing linked to the municipality’s Southern Aqueduct upgrade project. The municipality introduced temporary...

item.title: J.K. Rowling Drafting Harry Potter and the Philosopher's Stone in Edinburgh Cafes, 1998
item.description: In 1998, renowned author J.K. Rowling was captured writing by hand in an Edinburgh café, a place where she developed significant portions of her first Harry Potter novel, Harry Potter and the Philosop...

item.title: Trailer of ‘Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai’ showcases Varun Dhawan, Mrunal Thakur and Pooja Hedge in a romantic love triangle
item.description: The trailer of the upcoming Hindi film ‘Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai’ has been released, featuring Varun Dhawan, Mrunal Thakur, and Pooja Hegde in leading roles. The film appears to revolve around a l...

item.title: Police investigate death of man who fell from Manchester city centre hotel
item.description: A man has died after falling from a building in Manchester city centre on Saturday afternoon, prompting an ongoing police investigation. Emergency services were called to Charles Street at around 4pm ...

item.title: Police search Clayton Park area of Halifax for missing newborn; four people in custody
item.description: Halifax Regional Police are conducting an active search in the Clayton Park neighbourhood of Halifax for a missing newborn baby. The operation began after authorities were notified on Friday evening o...

item.title: Human Responsibility and Environmental Stewardship in God’s Creation
item.description: The opinion article discusses how the natural world reflects God’s deliberate and purposeful design. According to the writer, every part of creation, including the sun, rivers, trees, animals, and hum...

item.title: Review of ‘Chand Mera Dil’: A troubled romance of young love, responsibility, and emotional imbalance
item.description: Vivek Soni’s film ‘Chand Mera Dil’ stars Lakshya and Ananya Panday as Aarav and Chandni, two engineering students who fall deeply in love at the age of 21. Their intense relationship quickly turns com...

item.title: How body neutrality helped the author overcome a lifetime of shame related to body size
item.description: In this personal essay, Jasper Peach reflects on growing up in the 1980s with a larger body and the societal shame attached to it. From childhood experiences of bullying to well-meaning but damaging c...
